creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: vanilla
Date: Thu May  8 14:48:10 2014
New Revision: 353311
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/353311
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r353311/

Log:
  Support STAGEDIR, add LICENSE
  
  PR:		ports/188503
  Submitted by:	Bartek Rutkowski <ports@robakdesign.com>
  Approved by:	portmgr@

Modified:
  head/devel/py-jsmin/Makefile
  head/devel/py-jsmin/pkg-descr

Modified: head/devel/py-jsmin/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-jsmin/Makefile	Thu May  8 14:44:50 2014	(r353310)
+++ head/devel/py-jsmin/Makefile	Thu May  8 14:48:10 2014	(r353311)
@@ -10,6 +10,8 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 MAINTAINER=	pclin@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	JavaScript minifier written in Python
 
+LICENSE=	MIT
+
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
 
@@ -18,16 +20,14 @@ PORTDOCS=	PKG-INFO
 
 PLIST_FILES=	%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
-
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
 
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
 post-install:
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
-	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${PORTDOCS:S,^,${WRKSRC}/,} ${DOCSDIR}
+	${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${PORTDOCS:S,^,${WRKSRC}/,} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
 .endif
 
 regression-test:

Modified: head/devel/py-jsmin/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-jsmin/pkg-descr	Thu May  8 14:44:50 2014	(r353310)
+++ head/devel/py-jsmin/pkg-descr	Thu May  8 14:48:10 2014	(r353311)
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-JavaScript minifier.
+Python JavaScript minifier.
 
 WWW: https://pypi.python.org/pypi/jsmin
